phase_progress: Phase 9: code 10/11 DONE. C-001..C-008 merged via PR #74. C-009 CODE DONE on branch kbd/phase-9-c009-configmap-revert: (a) manifest revert — removed init-config initContainer, config.toml now a read-only subPath ConfigMap mount at /data/config.toml (kustomize render verified); (b) FIXED a data-loss bug found in merged C-008 — the import wrote source=bootstrap, which the post-revert boot-seed would overwrite with the empty ConfigMap baseline; import now writes source=runtime (RuntimeProtected), with a cutover-survival regression test. APPLY is HUMAN + hard-gated, strict order: deploy the C-009-fixed image -> run C-008 import daemon-down on prod PVC -> verify values resolve from DB -> kubectl apply -k the revert. C-005c (generic config_set) remains future.

next_action.command: Open C-009 PR; HUMAN executes the cutover runbook (deploy fixed image -> import -> verify -> apply revert)
next_action.description: C-009 code (manifest revert + C-008 source=runtime fix) is ready for PR. The cluster cutover is human-only and strictly ordered to avoid prod data loss (R-1). Apply the ConfigMap revert ONLY after the import is verified on the fixed image.
